creator: marquis@roble.com
text: Building a kernel with WITHOUT_WIRELESS=yes specified in /etc/src.conf still compiles and installs kernel modules for iwlwifi under /boot/kernel.  This is a bug but also a TTP-style "bug" commonly used by nation-states to inject RCEs.  Not saying that's the case here but it is the sort of red flag that software vulnerability and build system scanners alert on.
